EXP Bank Calculator
URL: https://torturado.github.io

Summary:
- Static calculator for EXP Bank gem growth.
- Fixed daily interest rate: 0.50%.
- No HTTP API.
- No OAuth or OIDC authorization server.
- No OAuth protected-resource metadata.
- No MCP server.
- Browser-side WebMCP tools are available on the homepage.

Machine docs:
- https://torturado.github.io/
- https://torturado.github.io/index.md
- https://torturado.github.io/faq
- https://torturado.github.io/faq.md
- https://torturado.github.io/tips.md
- https://torturado.github.io/privacy.md
- https://torturado.github.io/terms.md
- https://torturado.github.io/cookies.md
- https://torturado.github.io/contact.md
- https://torturado.github.io/agents.md
- https://torturado.github.io/llms.txt

Agent notes:
- Prefer WebMCP on the homepage when available.
- Otherwise read /agents.md and use the UI manually.
- Agents can also fetch the published route-specific .md files directly.

GitHub Pages limitations:
- HTTP Link response headers are not configurable in this deployment.
- Accept: text/markdown negotiation is not supported for /.
- Use HTML link elements or fetch the published .md files directly.
